name: Speak
tagline: Speaks completed Cline replies with ElevenLabs text to speech
description: Registers a conversational response rule and an `afterRun` hook. When a Cline turn completes, the final assistant reply is handed to a detached local worker that sends it to ElevenLabs, plays the returned audio locally, and cleans up. Playback runs outside the hook timeout so it never blocks Cline.

env.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
env.description: ElevenLabs API key used for text to speech.
